name: Anna Bukowski
subject: bumping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Hey Team, before tonight.

| Hey Team-- Wanted to email you one more time and see if you could pitch in so our offices have all the supplies they need before our final get out the vote push next weekend. We're still about $4,260 short so if you give before midnight so we can get our full order in that would be a huge help. Here's the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181027PM_em-A&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Anna Bukowski
Digital Director
* * *
[](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181027PM_em-A&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, across the state Minnesotans are knocking doors, making phone calls, and doing the hard work it takes to win this Senate race. And in just about every office you'll find posters like these taped on the wall. [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181027PM_em-A&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") As we go into the homestretch our offices still need extra supplies for the flood of volunteers who we need to get out the vote. And with our budget stretched taking on the incoming attacks from our opponent and right-wing special interests, we're coming to you for help. **[We need to raise $20,000 today to stock up our offices across the state with everything they need for the homestretch -- pens, pencils, clipboards, phones. Can you pitch in so we can get our order in before midnight?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181027PM_em-A&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2a4/c1f7015/6ed5063b/11408fde/2731361032/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181027PM_em-A-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Bill Nelson and Joe Donnelly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **_"Senate slipping away as Dems fight to preserve blue wave"_**
\-- Associated Press; 10/23/2018 We don't usually send you messages about other races, but this is important Peter. **My colleagues, Bill Nelson and Joe Donnelly, are in tough re-election fights.** Simply put: If Bill and Joe lose their re-election bids in Florida and Indiana, a Democratic majority is impossible. [**Will you pitch in $5, $10, or more to support Bill and Joe's campaign efforts? We need to make sure they have the resources they need to turn out the vote!**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffef9/4462dc26/710484c8/201f299d/3395149214/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027?refcode=sbe181027_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Bill Nelson, Joe Donnelly, and Sherrod Brown:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffef9/4462dc26/710484c8/201f299c/3395149214/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181027_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffef9/4462dc26/710484c8/201f299c/3395149214/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181027_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffef9/4462dc26/710484c8/201f299c/3395149214/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181027_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffef9/4462dc26/710484c8/201f299d/3395149214/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027?refcode=sbe181027_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Bill Nelson is a fearless leader for the people of Florida. Joe Donnelly is an incredibly dedicated fighter for Hoosiers. When it comes to combating the opioid epidemic, keeping health care affordable, protecting Medicare and Social Security, and safeguarding working families, Bill and Joe are champions we can all count on. Bill, Joe, and I also have something in common: **Republicans have targeted us for defeat.** The GOP and the special interests want the Ohio, Florida, and Indiana U.S. Senate seats -- and they're spending big bucks to get them. (In Florida, Bill Nelson has been outspent 5-to-1. That's $90 million and counting!) You're one of Team Sherrod's most dedicated supporters. Peter, I'm asking if you can help out my colleagues as well. [**If you can, give $5 or more to help send Bill and Joe back to the Senate.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffef9/4462dc26/710484c8/201f299d/3395149214/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDI3IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181027?refcode=sbe181027_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Democrat Josh Harder is narrowly leading a Republican incumbent in a toss-up district in California. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181027_Harder_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter,

We're so close to taking back the House of Representatives. But, as we learned in 2016, a small polling error can cost us everything.

All across the country, Democratic challengers are competing with incumbent Republicans who have done nothing but rubber-stamp the Trump administration's racist, climate-destroying policies. Including right here in California.

**The latest polling has Democrat Josh Harder narrowly leading a Republican incumbent in a toss-up district.** [****](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181027_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [**Chip in $5 or more to help Josh Harder crack 50% >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. ******[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036696/4ac3d62d/6a0c6d19/1ce299db/4148351322/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181027_Harder_EM")******
******[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036696/4ac3d62d/6a0c6d19/1ce299d8/4148351322/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181027_Harder_EM")******
******[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036696/4ac3d62d/6a0c6d19/1ce299d9/4148351322/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_181027_Harder_EM")******
******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181027_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
Josh Harder is an incredible candidate -- you have to be to be leading a four-term incumbent. But his victory (or defeat) rests upon a very, very small margin.

Let's make sure that Josh Harder becomes the next Congressman to represent California's 10th District -- to create jobs, to fight for our environment, and to stand up to the President.

[**Please -- help us start the Blue Wave right here in California >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181027_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Onward,

Team Sanchez
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. name: Joe
subject: I'll be up front:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
My opponent seems to believe that if he wins in ten days, his job will be to serve as a copy machine for President Trump. And too bad for any Hoosier who disagrees! |
---
| | Peter,

I'll be up front with you: **[I'm asking you to volunteer for my campaign with whatever time you have.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a6a/7377f838/26bb4548/51f8a9f6/3113644091/VEsH/ "https://joeforindiana.com/volunteer/")** Now let me tell you why.

This is one of the closest races in the country. The latest polls show a dead heat. My opponent's campaign has spent _$11 million_. Mitch McConnell's super PAC dumped in $11 million more.

Our campaign isn't about super PACs and dark money -- we're relying on grassroots support to win. And that's why the other side's money doesn't scare me.

**But if we 're going to take this race from a tie to a win, we have to be able to fight back against all those millions -- with an incredible Get Out the Vote push. I know we can do it. Peter, will you sign up for whichever volunteer opportunity you can manage?** | **[**SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a6a/7377f838/26bb4548/51f8a9f6/3113644091/VEsE/ "https://joeforindiana.com/volunteer/")**
---
My opponent seems to believe that if he wins in ten days, his job will be to serve as a **copy machine for President Trump**. And too bad for any Hoosier who disagrees!

But that's not how I see the job. As Indiana's hired help in the Senate, my job is to think through the issues and do what's right for Hoosiers -- which is why I'm going to keep fighting to protect our health care and put a stop to the worst parts of the president's agenda.

**But that only happens if I make it back to the Senate. And there 's not much time left for you to make a final impact in this toss-up race. [So Peter, would you sign up for a volunteer shift or two to make a huge difference in these final days of the campaign?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a6a/7377f838/26bb4548/51f8a9f6/3113644091/VEsF/ "https://joeforindiana.com/volunteer/")**

Thank you,
Joe

**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2a6a/7377f838/26bb4548/51f8a9f1/3113644091/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-oct-eoq?refcode=20181027.2is&amount=25")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206

body:

name: betofortexas.com
subject: Closing the gap in this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

“This group in Texas has a Dem share of 53.7% -- the kind of voters Beto
needs to have a chance to win. The Democratic Base share of returners in
Texas to-date is only 0.4 points behind the Republican Base share.”

Catalist Absentee & Early Vote Snapshot | October 26

The data science firm Catalist shared some exciting numbers yesterday: of
votes cast so far in Texas during early voting, as you can see above, it’s
close. Really close.

Texas isn’t a “red” or a “blue” state: it’s a non-voting state. And when
more voters show up at the polls, Texas is competitive. We can win this
race -- but only if we get every single Beto supporter out to the polls to
vote.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181027&t=1019&akid=21886%2E444211%2Efmh6fx ]Can Beto count on you to make
your first contribution right now? Help us reach as many
Beto voters as possible and get them to the polls.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181027&t=1020&akid=21886%2E444211%2Efmh6fx ]Contribute
$3
»

This weekend, October 27 and 28, is the ONLY weekend Texans can vote
early. Right now, thousands of volunteers are in communities across Texas
knocking on doors, and helping Beto supporters make a plan to vote.

Polls have shown Beto within the margin of error -- but Catalist’s
analysis of the votes already cast show it even closer.

This race is going to be incredibly close -- among the closest in the
country. With enough work in these final few days, we can close the
narrowing gap.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181027&t=1022&akid=21886%2E444211%2Efmh6fx ]If you’ve never contributed before, we need you now:
pitch in your first contribution of
$3
or more to Beto’s campaign to take on Ted Cruz.

Thanks,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181027&t=1023&akid=21886%2E444211%2Efmh6fx ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181028footer&t=1024&akid=21886%2E444211%2Efmh6fx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=21886%2E444211%2Efmh6fx

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Steve Scalise
subject: That's not a typo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scalise For Congress
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ The Liberals have raised a BILLION dollars. That’s not a typo. They’re outraising us in competitive House districts by 300%, and by 200% across the board. Fellow Conservative, **The Liberals have raised a BILLION dollars. That’s not a typo.** They’re outraising us in competitive House districts by 300%, and by 200% across all races. We’re still holding on in battleground seats... but we need help. So I set an ambitious goal to reinforce Conservatives in competitive districts. **We’re almost there. We only need 1,164 Conservatives to step up before midnight.** [**Conservatives don’t give up. That’s why I’m activating a 24-hour 5x-matching program for all grassroots donations.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MzAxLTAzODFlZDU5Yjk2MDRmMDNhNmYxNWFlZTUzMDQ1NzAx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3AYm9keV90eHRfZmlyc3Q%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLnZpY3RvcnlwYXNzcG9ydC5jb20vc2NhbGlzZS81eC1leHRlbmRlZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgxMDI4X0FFLUdPUDNfU3RldmVTY2FsaXNlJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgxMDI4X1RoYXRzTm90QVR5cG8mYWN0aW9uPWVtYWlsX2NsaWNrJmhhMT0&K=fYHoh-NR_J6tBXqXGC5OHw) Pelosi announced the biggest digital ad blitz in history and it’s already on the airwaves. Pelosi announced the biggest digital ad blitz in history and it’s already on the airwaves. Fact checks prove the Left is misleading millions of voters in swing districts. If we don’t step up now we could lose Trump’s Majority. Please make a today: | ** You’ve already been contacted by Vice President Mike Pence, Speaker Paul Ryan, Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove and others... We are close to our goal. Don't let us fall short now. To victory, Steve Scalise House Majority Whip Paid for by Scalise For Congress 107 S. West Street • #115 • Alexandria, VA 22314 **

**Minnesota needs a uniter in the governor 's office over the next four years. This state's success was built on its people's capacity to come together to solve problems and seize opportunities. That capacity has eroded, in part because two decades of divide-and-conquer politics have pitted regions, races, genders and generations against one other. Rebuilding a "One Minnesota" ethos in this state's politics and government is crucial to sustaining prosperity and quality of life.**

**" One Minnesota" is more than a slogan for Walz. His personal story, public record, policy positions and campaign performance all buttress his promise to bring bridge-building leadership to the governor's office.**

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: #DefeatHate - Vote for Democrats
body:
Activist - Donald Trump has unleashed white nationalist hatred against black Americans, Latinos, Muslims - and now Jews. This hatred has led to neo-Nazi marches, internment camps, separating children from their parents, mail bombs - and murder. Trump and his angry Republican allies refuse to take any responsibility for fanning the flames of hatred - or make any serious effort to stop it. **On Election Day - Tuesday, November 6 - we must elect Democrats at every level to #DefeatHate.** Here's how: 1\. [**Preview your ballot with comprehensive recommendations from progressive groups, presented by #VOTEPROCHOICE**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/6/D5/r5cs/6fBXF5/sMK1wPMPgG/P/P). Use it to [vote early](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/s/DD/r5cs/6fBXF5/v5NEbe4J8b/P/P) if your state allows it. [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/v/D5/r5cs/6fBXF5/TgvP8NhsJ/P/P) 2\. **[Sign up to volunteer! Join us with The Last Weekend campaign and visit your neighbors to turn out more Democratic voters.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/z/DN/r5cs/6fBXF5/vpZ0xnhHML/P/P) ** 3\. **[Download the VoteWithMe app](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/U/pZ/r5cs/6fBXF5/fjAcUW78j/P/P) **(for iPhone and Android)**** to see which of your friends and family are registered progressives in Early Voting states.**[Urge them to vote now!](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/j/pZ/r5cs/6fBXF5/zb39RxppXd/P/P)** [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/5/pZ/r5cs/6fBXF5/zV5iBxqy27/P/P) 4\. **[Join the Blue Wave Voters Facebook group](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/r/pz/r5cs/6fBXF5/6ERIXgsJK7/P/P) **and connect with other progressive activists who are helping to build the Blue Wave. 5\. **[Build the Blue Wave Voters movement](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/Y/Dt/r5cs/6fBXF5/zxp5oCsGki/P/P)**. Show your Blue Wave pride and your opposition to red MAGA caps. Our gear is 100% made in the USA and union printed. [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/e/DG/r5cs/6fBXF5/vl8VCA6EIe/P/P) Our Blue Wave is strong - **[we have an 8% advantage in the polls](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/tPV3D/3/Dp/r5cs/6fBXF5/U5wmq3T9RE/P/P), **but Trump is firing up his angry supporters, and we _know_ they are going to vote. We can't afford to have a single Democrat stay home on Election Day. The Blue Wave is coming. Thanks for joining us! Bob Fertik
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDM3LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjY2MTY2OTUx)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: FW: at a crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
From his brave advocacy during the Civil Rights Movement to his work today on behalf of Georgia families in Congress, Congressman John Lewis has devoted his life and his career to the pursuit of justice. It is a deep, sincere honor to have earned his support in this race.
| | Peter, I hope you can take a moment to read Congressman John Lewis's note below. From his brave advocacy during the Civil Rights Movement to his work today on behalf of Georgia families in Congress, Congressman Lewis has devoted his life and his career to the pursuit of justice. **It is a deep, sincere honor to have earned his support in this race.** I hope you will take his message to heart, Peter, [**and then consider joining him in supporting our campaign with a donation.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sD7qvzcaaKWDHBg8rutjSNf4M7z5M1V-D8sZ7tuNExo=/eK_1Xe8fPP4KdKuuW_Z5Mmgg7dK6OuOKqmt2eSm5g2Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) We have only 9 days to go until the election, and so much is a stake. Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Congressman John Lewis Sent: Sat, Oct 27, 10:31 AM Subject: at a crossroads Friends, _Our country is at a crossroads._ From attempts to curtail voting rights to actions to undermine access to health care, some of our most basic rights as Americans are under attack by the current Administration and others in power in Washington. It is imperative that we elect new leaders this November who have the courage to come to Congress and take action to defend the rights of all Americans. **One such leader, friends, is Abigail Spanberger** \-- a true public servant who will stand up for every Virginian in Washington. [**Friends, will you join me in supporting Abigail with a donation today, ahead of her important fundraising deadline on Wednesday?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sD7qvzcaaKWDHBg8rutjSNf4M7z5M1V-D8sZ7tuNExo=/eK_1Xe8fPP4KdKuuW_Z5Mmgg7dK6OuOKqmt2eSm5g2Q=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Millions of Americans have responded to recent attacks on our rights not with silence, but with action -- by exercising their right to vote, by writing their representatives and senators, and of course by marching on Washington, as fellow activists and I did to demand our civil rights years ago. This outpouring of activism by everyday Americans has been inspiring. But marching is not where our movement ends. We must take our cause to the ballot box. Abigail will defend and respect the rights of all Virginians in Congress, and she will work to improve her community through advocating for common-sense gun safety measures and lowering health care costs and expanding access to care. Abigail will be a partner for justice in Washington, but her race this fall is very competitive, so she needs our support today so she can keep up the fight for all of us. It is a deep, sincere honor to have earned his support in this race. | | Peter, I hope you can take a moment to read Congressman John Lewis's note below. From his brave advocacy during the Civil Rights Movement to his work today on behalf of Georgia families in Congress, Congressman Lewis has devoted his life and his career to the pursuit of justice. It is a deep, sincere honor to have earned his support in this race. I hope you will take his message to heart, Peter, We have only 9 days to go until the election, and so much is a stake. Thanks, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Congressman John Lewis Sent: Sat, Oct 27, 10:31 AM Subject: at a crossroads Friends, Our country is at a crossroads. From attempts to curtail voting rights to actions to undermine access to health care, some of our most basic rights as Americans are under attack by the current Administration and others in power in Washington. It is imperative that we elect new leaders this November who have the courage to come to Congress and take action to defend the rights of all Americans. One such leader, friends, is Abigail Spanberger \-- a true public servant who will stand up for every Virginian in Washington. Millions of Americans have responded to recent attacks on our rights not with silence, but with action -- by exercising their right to vote, by writing their representatives and senators, and of course by marching on Washington, as fellow activists and I did to demand our civil rights years ago. This outpouring of activism by everyday Americans has been inspiring. But marching is not where our movement ends. We must take our cause to the ballot box. Abigail will defend and respect the rights of all Virginians in Congress, and she will work to improve her community through advocating for common-sense gun safety measures and lowering health care costs and expanding access to care. Abigail will be a partner for justice in Washington, but her race this fall is very competitive, so she needs our support today so she can keep up the fight for all of us. Thank you, Congressman John Lewis Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Team Scholten
subject: Biggest Endorsement Yet! 📰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**This one is huge.** The conservative-leaning _Sioux City Journal_ editorial board has announced their endorsement of J.D. Scholten in the race against Steve King! What makes this especially significant is that **_the Journal has always endorsed King_** in the general election.
**Until now.**
This endorsement flip reflects the shift we’re seeing across the district here in the 4th! [**_Help us capitalize on it and finish this election strong with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2882834/18458065/-57782859?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTllMWQzYy1kMWRhLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ucq6D7hbjsKHW9RN_lAKk5p1TiTKN-AfgBNfUqY3skk=)
Some excerpts from the endorsement:
_“Today, The Journal editorial board endorses the candidacy of Democratic challenger J.D. Scholten over incumbent Republican Steve King in the race for the U.S. House seat in Iowa's 4th District. Those were not easy words for us to write._
_... Bright, articulate, personable, possessed of deep roots in this district, informed about issues important to the 4th like agriculture, and armed with a willingness to consider all sides of complex issues such as illegal immigration and work across the aisle to identify solutions to problems, Scholten offers appeal for not only Democrats, but independents and Republicans, as well, we believe._
_With a candidate of Scholten's caliber on the ballot, we decided we wouldn't overlook, again, the concerns we have shared about King in the past in making an endorsement in this race this year._
_We say nothing about King today we haven't said before. Time and again in this space, we have criticized him for what we view as inflammatory or questionable comments and expressed concern about the impact of those comments on our district. Each time King immerses himself in controversy, he holds up this district to ridicule and marginalizes himself within the legislative body he serves, neither of which provides benefit to Iowans who live and work here._
_... As a congressman, we believe Scholten would choose his words carefully, create no national controversies, bring no embarrassment to the district, seek to unite and not divide, focus his time and energy almost exclusively on issues directly impacting the lives and livelihoods of constituents, and hold regular town halls with the public. He represents changes we believe speak to the best interests of this congressional district as a whole._
_... Bottom line: We are ready and willing to give him the opportunity to show all of us in the 4th what he can do.”_
We couldn’t be more excited! With just ten days left until Election Day, this seat is clearly up for grabs. **With your help, we can grasp a victory that has eluded Democrats for 16 years.** _[**Please consider a contribution of whatever you can today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2882835/18458066/-57782859?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTllMWQzYy1kMWRhLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ucq6D7hbjsKHW9RN_lAKk5p1TiTKN-AfgBNfUqY3skk=)_
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2882836/18458067/-57782859?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTllMWQzYy1kMWRhLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ucq6D7hbjsKHW9RN_lAKk5p1TiTKN-AfgBNfUqY3skk=)
Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9aa59fa1-2eda-e811-8607-281878391efb/fa9e1d3c-d1da-e811-8607-281878391efb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTllMWQzYy1kMWRhLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ucq6D7hbjsKHW9RN_lAKk5p1TiTKN-AfgBNfUqY3skk=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

body:

name: Molly (personal)
subject: can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Friends - in a minute, I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign - but first, with just nine days until the election, can you give me a moment to explain why this is so important?
Right-wing corporate interests - including the Koch brothers - are pouring money into Chris Sununu's campaign to defeat me. They're dead-set on keeping their influence in the Granite State to make sure they can keep getting richer at the expense of working families.
When I'm governor, you and your family will _always_ be my top priority. That's why I'm refusing to accept a single cent from corporate special interests - I'm accountable to you. Not special interests. **That's why this campaign has the support of people like President Barack Obama and Senator Elizabeth Warren.**
**But that also means I don't have a shot at winning this race without the support of this grassroots team - without _you_. That's why I'm asking you to donate anything you can to my campaign right now to help us stay strong in these final weeks and defeat Chris Sununu on Nov. 6.**
**[_Please, give $5 or more - every dollar you can before midnight tonight - to help me keep up with Sununu's fundraising and flip New Hampshire blue this November._](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a94/d0ce7de/50d0b690/9cdd847/1177861653/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTkwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk190-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Anything and everything you can spare makes such a difference in a race this close. I can't thank you enough for your support.

Molly

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a94/d0ce7de/50d0b690/9cdd846/1177861653/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. name: Chris Sununu
subject: Tuesday in Bedford
body:
Derek, **There is no reason for New Hampshire Republicans to stay home this November.** [ ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSKxj0A5PmSSFIFlGoijO1Ro-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MVainbjuDNWdFedPYUPsP-2BZwgnVmhGAZNfnb251jDN73E6v8-2BFTJQ2-2B8pOmlDiDiVtBjuVFTKZl4CYIueHSyqz85jl4l1C1VvWEdFUihjZOwU4xcGlmemnu4IrWIPQoY0-2BDqr6oMMZv5iss6p16QYBcE1QIWj2BrCOkE6ODuohLPdaC2YkYkeTp-2BnRuht-2F-2F-2BTwF-2F8yvMHUs5Gros7VATbecxeGCacm-2BgNr6UfuV3lK3GLYZ-2BXfaA1aylQXMltQJC7O78pWh-2Bd-2FKI311vwoEduOw-3D-3D) From funding full-day kindergarten, lowering business taxes and spurring economic growth, we've gotten a lot done for the Granite State these last two years. But, there's still more to do. While Republicans lead with _#603Pride_ , our opponents are leading with income tax proposals and limiting school choice. clean_body: Derek, There is no reason for New Hampshire Republicans to stay home this November. From funding full-day kindergarten, lowering business taxes and spurring economic growth, we've gotten a lot done for the Granite State these last two years. But, there's still more to do. While Republicans lead with #603Pride , our opponents are leading with income tax proposals and limiting school choice. We've made tremendous strides in New Hampshire, but we need to finish strong through Election Day. I need you to defend our agenda, our country, and our Presidency. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

name: Senator Amy Klobuchar
subject: working hard until the polls close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
Since the end of June, President Trump and Vice President Pence have both campaigned in Minnesota twice. They've made it very clear they're targeting our state in this election.
We're not going to let chaos and negativity win the day, though. **All along we haven 't just been resisting, we've been _insisting_ on a better way forward for Minnesota and the nation.** And on Election Day, Minnesotans will have the chance to respond with their votes.
But with November 6th less than two weeks away, we got _a lot_ of work to do before the polls close. So we're setting an end-of-month goal of raising $75,000 by Wednesday.
This team has had my back before, so I know we can do it. Let's show Washington that we're ready to find common ground, break through the bickering, and get results for people.
**We need your help. Will you make a contribution to help us reach our final end-of-month goal before the election?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Thank you,
Amy

name: Carrie Lucking, Walz-Flanagan for One Minnesota
subject: Nine lifetimes
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend:

We're 9 days out, and things are moving at full speed.

Here's the thing: nine days is like nine liftetimes in a campaign.
**We 're in the midst of a rapidly changing political environment, and polls are tightening.**
Here's what we're going to do. We're going to counter fear with hope for One Minnesota. We're going to make sure that voters know the choice in this election -- we can move boldly forward and face our toughest challenges, or we can turn back the clock.
The choice is clear. **_We won 't let Jeff Johnson take us backward._**

That's why we need your help. We're hammering out our budget for the final week of the campaign - and we need to make some really important decisions.
**Will you rush a contribution right now so****we can FULLY FUND our media and voter outreach efforts?[Click here >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/6B5FOQoV-UvsUtt3zLmVd2c6URqmJ2wigWM0eJxcQzI=/1uTb3gFqGoLgJPFWR_gnhfQzA_Dq1pcdLU7DMU0_934=)**

name: Tina Smith
subject: falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our final end-of-month deadline is almost here.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181028AM-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, Our final end-of-month deadline is in 3 days, Election Day is in 9 days, and we're falling behind of where we need to be. _ABC News_ called this race a "toss up" and the latest polls are showing this race as close as three points. Now we just got word that another right-wing super PAC is on the airwaves with a big ad buy against us. Between now and midnight on October 31 we need to raise $55,000 from this grassroots team to get out the vote and counter the money coming from the other side. **[Can I count on you to pitch in $10 and make sure we stop Republican special interests and big donors from buying this Senate seat?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181028AM-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Bob  Corney, Bredesen 2018
subject: With your help, this is what we’ve built
body:
|
#
Peter -- In the last year, we’ve opened 24 field offices with Tennessee Victory 2018, and they’re filled with people just like you -- true believers in our grassroots movement to change Washington. **With your help, this is what we’ve built together:** This is what our campaign has always been all about: bringing people together to get things done. **And we think that’s what Washington should be all about too.** We can’t make it that way unless we finish this campaign strong, and we can’t finish strong without your help. There are only a few days left until the end of early voting, and Election Day is only a few more days after that. Winning this thing is going to take everyone giving it their all. **Can you chip in $10, or whatever you can, to help us for the final push? name: Madeleine Albright
subject: I am anxious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I have been in politics for decades. I have broken glass ceilings as the first female Secretary of State and gone toe to toe with some of the world's toughest leaders. It takes a lot to make me uneasy
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e0d/1a8421e1/19b202726/496e45cc/3943837997/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
**This is urgent --** **[I am asking for $25 to help get Tom O'Halleran to Congress.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b1_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I have been in politics for decades. I have broken glass ceilings as the first female Secretary of State and gone toe to toe with some of the world's toughest leaders. It takes a lot to make me uneasy, but right now,**I am anxious.** The midterm elections are just 9 days away and control of the House could come down to just one or two races. **Tom 's race could decide control of Congress so I am personally reaching out to ask you to rush urgently needed support to Tom's campaign today.** **You can do your part by using this link to send a donation right now:** [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/support-tom**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b1_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") It is clear that Tom is on a mission to restore sanity in our nation's capital. He is a champion for ensuring all Americans have access to accessible and affordable health care and has shown time and again that he will put the needs of Arizona first. But this race is going to be a close one and Tom needs your help in these final days. **Can I count on you to contribute to Tom 's campaign today? Here's the link again:** [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/support-tom**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b1_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") These are dire times. The current administration, along with the GOP-led Congress, is dividing this country from our allies and turning Americans against one another. Our shared Democratic values are on the chopping block. If Democrats don't take back the House, I fear the fabric of our nation could be seriously damaged. **Electing Democrats like Tom who will check this president is now a matter of national urgency.** So, before I sign off, I am going to directly ask you one last time: As a fellow American, will you do your part to bring this country back together by chipping in to elect Tom in this high-priority race? **If you answered yes, then please click this link right now:** [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/support-tom**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b1_ma_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you for standing up for our American values, Madeleine Albright | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. subject: Laxalt’s family is supporting Steve. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Believe me, we were surprised at first, too. But it made perfect sense once they told us why.

**ICYMI: "Family members: Don't vote for Laxalt to be Nevada's governor"**
--_Las Vegas Sun_ , 10/25/18

Chip in $5 or more today to help Steve Sisolak beat Adam Laxalt on November 6th >>
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/P0B0GVbj4VIVJi2dViNDLwLE2LCGKnqDYtU9KJRaeuQ=/SrfpEzzW6PCEIv05CdVVbNgvfX3ekW4so3pyAWr7VCY=?gpsid=37_57_4780&refcode=em18_181028_LxFam2_B1_fnd_gq_act__DG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_LxFam2_B1_fnd_gq_act__DG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---

Dear Friend,

By now, you may have seen that a dozen members of Adam Laxalt's family have come out and announced that they're opposing their own relative's campaign for governor.

Believe me, we were surprised at first, too. But it made perfect sense once they told us why.

Everything about Adam Laxalt's tenure as attorney general here has showed us that he's unfit to serve as governor. He's repeatedly put the needs of his special interest backers, like the Kochs, ahead of Nevadans. He's a lackey for them, not a public servant for us.

And Adam Laxalt's family knows that better than anyone.

**[We can't let Adam Laxalt do any more damage to our state -- we must elect Steve Sisolak to move Nevada forward. Chip in right now to make it happen.](https://act.myngp.com/el/P0B0GVbj4VIVJi2dViNDLwLE2LCGKnqDYtU9KJRaeuQ=/SrfpEzzW6PCEIv05CdVVbNgvfX3ekW4so3pyAWr7VCY=?gpsid=37_57_4780&refcode=em18_181028_LxFam2_L1_fnd_gq_act__DG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_LxFam2_L1_fnd_gq_act__DG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thank you,

name: Ed Rodriguez, AndrewGillum.com
subject: my enlistment
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3619/9e00690/54cca640/2400f2fe/2548706019/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&source=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx")
Friends,

My name is Ed and when this photo was taken, I had just returned from Fallujah, Iraq.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3619/9e00690/54cca640/2400f2f1/2548706019/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=8_55_4443&refcode=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=2")
Right out of high school, I enlisted in the military, serving for five years as a Navy Corpsman embedded with the Marine Corps. I deployed to Iraq during my enlistment, where I provided frontline medical support to our troops during combat operations in Fallujah. After Fallujah, I finished out my enlistment, returned to my home state of Florida, and started college.

Everything was going well for the first nine months; but then, the unthinkable happened -- I was diagnosed with cancer.

Thankfully, I was able to access quality healthcare at the VA and received chemotherapy treatments that saved my life. It was a tough challenge getting healthy again, but I was able to beat cancer and return to school. I graduated from the University of Florida with a bachelor's degree, becoming the first person in my family to finish college.

As a veteran, an immigrant, a cancer survivor, and a first-generation college graduate, I know all too well that our state is filled with wonderful people. However, the policies that our elected leaders push for don't always work in service of those people. I'm so grateful for the help that I received, but I know not everyone has the same privileges.

That is why I am proud to support Andrew Gillum for Governor -- because he's a leader who grew up just like a majority of working Floridians and holds our same values. It's past time for our state to have a Governor that understands the struggles of everyday Floridians and is willing to fight for us to make sure we all have the resources we need to succeed in life.

Listen, this election is too important to sit on the sideline. We need every Floridian who cares about this state to help Mayor Gillum become our next Governor. **[If you're with us, chip in today to help bring it home in November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3619/9e00690/54cca640/2400f2f0/2548706019/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=8_55_4443&refcode=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettxx&utm_campaign=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=3+-+If+youre+with+us+chip+in+today+to+help+b")**

Thanks,

Ed Rodriguez
Deputy Policy Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3619/9e00690/54cca640/2400f2f3/2548706019/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=8_55_4443&refcode=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Use of rank does not imply endorsement by the Marine Corps, Navy or the Department of Defense.

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3619/9e00690/54cca640/2400f2f2/2548706019/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3619/9e00690/54cca640/2400f2f5/2548706019/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&source=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3619/9e00690/54cca640/2400f2f4/2548706019/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx&source=em18_181022_EdRe_fnd_gq_nopn__ER_ettx")

name: Leah
subject: URGENT: amazing offer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I'm watching everything with you right now. I know what the media is saying. They are counting us out. They don’t think we can win. But....
****
Friend,

I'm watching everything with you right now.

I know what the media is saying. They are counting us out. They don’t think we can win. But friend, they’re wrong.

They said the same about President Trump and Ron Johnson.

With just 9 days before the election, we're stronger than ever! Our supporters are energized and we are NOT backing down anytime soon.

But with our FINAL end of month deadline of the year coming up, we're running short on the funds we need to get us through Election Day.

**[MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=bcb37c8d0bd9408d904972a3c4394f03&_e=5y8IxIs6p8xxibC7uEXP21xYixu2Nc_JjtifXET82YR-ZqxcqqD0PhEwTM0MtksfrH-AwGvDhviO-OYBj3abQu5VyYWIr8Qi-Hk1Ip69jUMfTnR7b5Q4zMgoht8xraX7ZeeSgIRh2v1WDTG6hZtTmg3Ft-QKqe32pHApBt8198mCiFzXVpyJmAAduSoyYEJGBODi4wP01AxW_RTXpcWWb-nwqvhFvEc80Je4VJgPbU8n9AVc1gbjuTCmJz6POWsqgaIeer1ASlPw3_QHNlludVkgbRG9zEpicM-roC1Y97B9v_hDqwzbq7dsKGSeQwvQK8twldNDmuW5pX4km7mb9R1tMeyhdEIGUYDZSxKCd6z24gD9x95oPme1WI0RsxGFQfq0gyjH843DJp0FBtwdlYNyCrVNYOLIIvA14lyuIkU%3D)**

Friend, we just can't afford to fall behind now.

Wisconsin NEEDS a voice in the Senate that doesn’t come from the far left, but comes from the working class people that make our state – and our country – what it is.

It's about working hard – and never giving up. It’s about leaving our kids with a world better than the one we received. It's about making sure every person has a voice in our process.

I will be that voice. Where Senator Baldwin has abandoned our way, I will fight for it.

But now – so close to Election Day – it’s going to take all of us working together to reach important goals like the one I'm writing about today.

We have to raise this $50,000 to send Senator Baldwin back to the private sector she doesn’t even know exists.

I hope you'll chip in now: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=bcb37c8d0bd9408d904972a3c4394f03&_e=5y8IxIs6p8xxibC7uEXP21xYixu2Nc_JjtifXET82YR-ZqxcqqD0PhEwTM0MtksfrH-AwGvDhviO-OYBj3abQu5VyYWIr8Qi-Hk1Ip69jUMfTnR7b5Q4zMgoht8xraX7ZeeSgIRh2v1WDTG6hZtTmg3Ft-QKqe32pHApBt8198mCiFzXVpyJmAAduSoyYEJGyVugCACdbTWKZfrAAqFkzFCkFiVGjaYV-ZibD3Gm-ezdlWY2bEL1z3aaIEioxW2GiYwd4dySaDhueA7kJR9B9sEPdSdJCrrqR1lx4yOCP2DdNvpSELxQ5W8D-KqVYhbLdTZksRUqlBq_kb9fBBVul87dcHyicmvs66SCyJrofWY9wKk3bieDmqVhhxQAdFtBNU4u7ZPo-bOllbELwROuBxiojYrJtsclC4D478m4fPk%3D)**

name: Dana Bye
subject: our grassroots strength will win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The excitement surrounding this election and Abigail's candidacy is palpable. This weekend, a huge group of supporters knocked doors around our district -- even through the rain!
| | Peter, We have 9 days to win this toss-up race for Central Virginia families. **And the reason I am feeling confident that we can pull it off is the strength of this grassroots team.** [**Our grassroots fundraising,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/eNqTJpbJTCpw-Bm3fFs3mkw4R61XX3Y1OFWd2aSY1bo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) thanks to this community of supporters, is surging, arming us with the resources we need to communicate our closing message to voters. **And we have another grassroots army on the ground in VA-7,** preparing for our critical get-out-the-vote push. The excitement surrounding this election and Abigail's candidacy is palpable. This weekend, a huge group of supporters knocked doors around our district -- _**even through the rain!**_ _Our first group of canvassers on Saturday filled our campaign office:_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/eNqTJpbJTCpw-Bm3fFs3mkw4R61XX3Y1OFWd2aSY1bo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [_**Make a donation here, Peter, to support our team of volunteers as we get our supporters to the polls!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/eNqTJpbJTCpw-Bm3fFs3mkw4R61XX3Y1OFWd2aSY1bo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Your support really will be critical over the next 9 days, Peter. Unlike Rep. Dave Brat, Abigail is not accepting a single dollar from corporate PACs, and we don't have Vice President Mike Pence flying in to campaign for us -- so YOU are powering this campaign. Plus, we have our final end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up on Wednesday, and in a toss-up like ours, [**every dollar is going to count,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/eNqTJpbJTCpw-Bm3fFs3mkw4R61XX3Y1OFWd2aSY1bo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) so we've set an ambitious goal. [**Chip in if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/eNqTJpbJTCpw-Bm3fFs3mkw4R61XX3Y1OFWd2aSY1bo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/eNqTJpbJTCpw-Bm3fFs3mkw4R61XX3Y1OFWd2aSY1bo=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/eNqTJpbJTCpw-Bm3fFs3mkw4R61XX3Y1OFWd2aSY1bo=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/kpTmDlv_CnZ5i1RE85pjd5V_gvGwnDA51zYqVggQCUc=/lPPNdVtabp8IhfOi5HYThF3AwxwGnJwUQlPkkXbMNZw=)_

Dave Brat, Abigail is not accepting a single dollar from corporate PACs, and we don't have Vice President Mike Pence flying in to campaign for us -- so YOU are powering this campaign. Plus, we have our final end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up on Wednesday, and in a toss-up like ours, so we've set an ambitious goal. Thanks, Dana Bye Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. name: Erin Dolan
subject: Which is it Hugin?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

One of the most blatant lies that Bob Hugin told during Wednesday's _NJTV_ Senate Debate was his laughable attempt to re-brand himself as a pro-choice Republican.

Hugin has spent years donating thousands of dollars to anti-choice candidates. He has been vocally supportive of anti-choice justices like Brett Kavanaugh, who has a well-documented history of opposing _Roe v. Wade._

**And when pressed on it by reporters, Hugin couldn't even muster a coherent response.**

[**Check out this video and then help us elect a real leader who has always been on New Jersey women's side, Bob Menendez.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf3/3af3c5d/38014437/4ec3120d/2104867381/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-antichoicehugin?gpsid=5_73_4758&refcode=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Check+out+this+video+and+then+help+us+el")

[](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf3/3af3c5d/38014437/4ec3120c/2104867381/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-antichoicehugin?gpsid=5_73_4758&refcode=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2") **[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf3/3af3c5d/38014437/4ec3120f/2104867381/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-antichoicehugin?gpsid=5_73_4758&refcode=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Donate")**
After running from his pro-Trump record in the debate, Bob Hugin continued to mislead voters with his claims to be pro-choice while simultaneously supporting Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court.

When told that Brett Kavanaugh said that the historic case was incorrectly decided, Hugin incoherently responded, "But that doesn't mean you change the - there are a lot of laws that don't get changed but decided for the different reason - and as the ultimate - they stay valid laws, but are changed - the rationale for supporting them."

**Which is it Hugin?**

Luckily, voters don't have to decipher Bob Menendez's position. He has been a vocal supporter of a woman's right to choose and has voted to protect it over and over again. But now Bob Menendez needs your help to win and stop Hugin and his anti-choice friends from forcing their draconian beliefs on the women of New Jersey.

[**Check out the video and chip in $5 or more now to help Bob Menendez win on November 6th.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf3/3af3c5d/38014437/4ec3120e/2104867381/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-antichoicehugin?gpsid=5_73_4758&refcode=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+Check+out+the+video+and+chip+in+5+or+mor")

Thank you,

Erin Dolan
Menendez for Senate

**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cf3/3af3c5d/38014437/4ec31201/2104867381/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-antichoicehugin?gpsid=5_73_4758&refcode=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_AntiCh_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&noskip=true&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=5+-+Donate")**

name: Team Beto
subject: Record. Breaking. Voter. Turnout.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Last night, we got some incredible news: since we launched our ‘get out
the vote’ efforts in early October, our amazing organizing team has
knocked on over ONE MILLION doors in Texas.

The latest polls have Ted Cruz barely leading by just a few points, and
now we’re seeing record-breaking voter turnout -- making the uncertainty
of the outcome even greater. We need to get more Beto supporters out to
the polls, and every door you knock and every dollar you give helps us
connect with even more voters.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181028&t=1019&akid=22135%2E444211%2EtrWSTt ]Please make your
first
$3
contribution right now to help us get as many Beto voters to the polls as
possible in this election. Every single contribution matters in this close
race.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181028&t=1020&akid=22135%2E444211%2EtrWSTt ]Contribute
$3
»

Every single person who’s supporting Beto is helping rewrite history --
including you. Together, we’re changing the face of the electorate in
Texas, inviting millions of new people to participate in our democracy.

Our equation to win is simple: we need to reach even more Texas voters in
these final 9 days. That means we need our volunteers and our organizers
to keep knocking on doors, making calls and sending texts. And we need to
keep Beto out on the road, meeting face-to-face with every last Texan he
can.

The outcome of this election could truly go either way. For us to win, we
cannot afford to fall short of our end-of-month fundraising goal -- and we
mean this. That’s why we have to ask again.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181028&t=1021&akid=22135%2E444211%2EtrWSTt ]If you can afford to, dig deep and pitch in
a contribution of
$3
to our record-breaking, history-making campaign for U.S. Senate. We’ve
only got 9 days to close this narrow gap.

Everything we do in these final 9 days will make a difference.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/12802?refcode=ema20181028&t=1022&akid=22135%2E444211%2EtrWSTt ]Contribute
$3
»

name: Phil Bredesen 2018
subject: The Kochs' “$400 Million political spending spree”
body:
| Peter -- The momentum we’ve built for real change in Washington hasn’t gone unnoticed. **That’s why the Koch brothers and other out-of-state special interests have been pouring money into negative attack ads to tear Phil Bredesen down.** This is their last ditch effort to buy the election, and we have to match their money with the same grassroots support that’s brought us this far. Now, more than ever, we need your help to get voters to the polls and to put our message in front of the last remaining undecided voters. That’s why we’re asking: **Can we count on you to chip in $10, or whatever you can, to go toe-to-toe with the Washington Swamp’s multi-million dollar blitz against us? clean_body: | Peter -- The momentum we’ve built for real change in Washington hasn’t gone unnoticed. That’s why the Koch brothers and other out-of-state special interests have been pouring money into negative attack ads to tear Phil Bredesen down. This is their last ditch effort to buy the election, and we have to match their money with the same grassroots support that’s brought us this far. Now, more than ever, we need your help to get voters to the polls and to put our message in front of the last remaining undecided voters. That’s why we’re asking: Can we count on you to chip in $10, or whatever you can, to go toe-to-toe with the Washington Swamp’s multi-million dollar blitz against us? You see what we’re up against, and you have the power to help us overcome false attacks from out-of-state billionaires. name: Team O'Halleran
subject: FW: I am anxious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Like Secretary Albright, I'm a bit anxious. Our race, as well as the race for the House, remains very close, and there is so much at stake in the result.
Friends, I hope you will take a moment to read the note below from Madeleine Albright, our esteemed former Secretary of State, and please take her message to heart. Because I'm a bit anxious, too, friends. Our race, as well as the race for the House, remains very close, and there is so much at stake in the result. **It 's critical that we elect a Democratic Congress to make Washington work for working families in Arizona and this country again, and we must win and keep AZ-01 blue to do so.** **[Please join Secretary Albright in supporting my campaign with a donation today. We have our final end-of-month deadline coming up in three days, and our goal is very ambitious.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: Madeleine Albright Subject: I am anxious **This is urgent --** **[I am asking for $25 to help get Tom O'Halleran to Congress.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I have been in politics for decades. I have broken glass ceilings as the first female Secretary of State and gone toe to toe with some of the world's toughest leaders. It takes a lot to make me uneasy, but right now,**I am anxious.** The midterm elections are just 9 days away and control of the House could come down to just one or two races. **Tom 's race could decide control of Congress so I am personally reaching out to ask you to rush urgently needed support to Tom's campaign today.** **You can do your part by using this link to send a donation right now:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/support-tom](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It is clear that Tom is on a mission to restore sanity in our nation's capital. He is a champion for ensuring all Americans have access to accessible and affordable health care and has shown time and again that he will put the needs of Arizona first. But this race is going to be a close one and Tom needs your help in these final days. **Can I count on you to contribute to Tom 's campaign today? Here's the link again:** [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/support-tom**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") These are dire times. The current administration, along with the GOP-led Congress, is dividing this country from our allies and turning Americans against one another. Our shared Democratic values are on the chopping block. If Democrats don't take back the House, I fear the fabric of our nation could be seriously damaged. **Electing Democrats like Tom who will check this president is now a matter of national urgency.** So, before I sign off, I am going to directly ask you one last time: As a fellow American, will you do your part to bring this country back together by chipping in to elect Tom in this high-priority race? **If you answered yes, then please click this link right now:** [**http://action.tomohalleran.com/support-tom**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you for standing up for our American values, Madeleine Albright | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.28_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e10/1a8421e1/19b1d9874/496e0087/1725694185/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e10/1a8421e1/19b1d9874/496e0088/1725694185/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonians. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e10/1a8421e1/19b1d9874/496e0089/1725694185/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe"). If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e10/1a8421e1/19b1d9874/496e008a/1725694185/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleran?refcode=email_footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000"). Thanks for having Tom's back!

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Pittsburgh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We need leaders who speak against fear, not use it.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5ad/2f5ea88d/742ea1ea/2cbd9047/238511401/VEsH/ "https://www.vote.org/") Do not be daunted
by the enormity
of the world's grief.

Do justly, now.
Love mercy, now.
Walk humbly, now.

You are not obligated
to complete the work,
but neither are you free
to abandon it.

\- The Talmud Friend -- My heart grieves for the families of the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh. And I stand with the millions of Americans who don't look like, who don't pray like, who don't love like the majority. As the Talmud, the source of theology for the Jewish people, says, we cannot be daunted by the grief -- we won't cure the world of hatred alone, but we must be part of the work to realize love and peace. Let me be perfectly clear: Pittsburgh was not a random act of violence. Nor were the pipe bomb attacks the act of a random madman -- they were directed at individuals who have spoken against the endless venom and division coming from our nation's capital. Our leadership is profiting from the forces of division, xenophobia, and anti-semitism; our president is preaching nationalism that questions the patriotism of anyone who doesn't look or act like the majority. There are grave consequences for a culture of hate and violence. A tweet didn't cause Pittsburgh. But leadership that preaches anger and hate, division and othering, promotes a culture of violence. And that culture of violence has been on full display in America this week. While President Trump spends his days rallying his base, demanding that we arm our teachers and our synagogues, we must chart a different path forward. We must strengthen community bonds, we must preach the power of loving acceptance, and we must open our arms to one another. Our survival depends on our collective action, on our resilience, on the better angels of our nature, and on our commitment to act on behalf of one another. On days like this, when forces of hate feel so pervasive and individuals feel powerless, it is important to remember we are stronger when we we stand together. We must not abandon our work, to lift up our brothers and our sisters who are marginalized and targeted by hatred and division. So I'll leave you with this: We aren't powerless. Not by a longshot. Speak up and speak out against hate. Talk to your friends. Embrace your neighbors. **And vote.** Vote for leaders who will defend our common values. Vote for leaders who will end the culture of hate in our nation. Vote for something better than what we've got right now. And know that I'll be standing right alongside you. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [VOTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b5ad/2f5ea88d/742ea1ea/2cbd9047/238511401/VEsE/ "https://www.vote.org/")
---

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: FWD: something has happened, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Did you see this note from Tammy Baldwin? Her campaign is in a real pinch -- her staff says that fewer people are opening these messages or making donations to her campaign over the last few days.
[**Could you please give $3 or more to help with her emergency fundraising push to get her grassroots donations back on track?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1f1/2a380d31/3629e73e/f167ea/1342044690/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAyNV9NV0g0VEItVEJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20181025_MWH4TB-TB_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Just a few days to go!
--Maggie Hassan's campaign staff
_\------------Original Message------------_
As you may know, everyone, the majority of contributions to my reelection campaign come from messages like this one. I know they can be really annoying sometimes, but they make a huge difference for our team -- that's why, with 12 days until the election, Maggie said that I could reach out to you.
Something has happened in the last few days. According to my finance and digital staffers, fewer people are opening these messages or making donations to our campaign over the last few days.
I don't want to alarm you, but that's a serious problem for our campaign -- especially given that President Trump just made a campaign stop in Wisconsin. The truth is, my right-wing opponent can count on millionaires and billionaires to cut outrageous checks to dark money super PACs to win, but I refuse to play that game. I want to win the right way.
So, if we're going to hold our own in the final two weeks against all these attacks and win this thing on November 6th, we need to catch back up on our goals -- quickly. And if we're going to do that it's going to come from messages like these, because I am never going to beg billionaires to start a super PAC for me.
[**Do you think you could add a contribution of $3 or more right now as part of our emergency push to get our grassroots fundraising back on track today? I need your help more than ever.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1f1/2a380d31/3629e73e/f167ea/1342044690/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAyNV9NV0g0VEItVEJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20181025_MWH4TB-TB_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you for everything you do for our campaign. A lot of my colleagues wish they had supporters like you they could count on in moments like these. I know how lucky I am to have you on my team.
Thanks again,
Tammy

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc1f1/2a380d31/3629e73e/f167eb/1342044690/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0dGIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAyNV9NV0g0VEItVEJfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4tb?refcode=e20181025_MWH4TB-TB_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _

name: UPDATE@debbiewassermanschultz.com
subject: Debbie stepped up. Now it's our turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Republicans "set sights" on defeating Debbie early in this race. The media said she'd "have to work a little harder" to win. Well, Debbie's no stranger to hard work. She stepped up. She's doing all she can to win -- and all she can to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **With the election just nine days away, will you step up as well?[We need to raise another $34,000 to hit our $218,000 October goal and keep our GOTV efforts running full steam through Election Day. Rush in a contribution >>](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c90/622b7b5b/1d969dd1/307b66d3/973163504/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181027?refcode=dwse181027_m&recurring=true&amount=5")** Debbie is focused on the challenges facing Florida families. Affording health care. Finding a job. Paying the bills. Starting a business. That's her job. **It's our job to make sure this network can face the challenges of this campaign.** [**Debbie's counting on us. Get your contribution in before time runs out.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c90/622b7b5b/1d969dd1/307b66d3/973163504/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181027?refcode=dwse181027_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c90/622b7b5b/1d969dd1/307b66d3/973163504/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181027?refcode=dwse181027_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
