name: TK2018, Jessalyn
subject: There's a wolf, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, you know it's not Tim's style to beg, plead, or say the world is ending. We're always honest with you about where we stand, and we don't exaggerate. **I told you I wouldn 't cry wolf unless there was really a wolf. Well Derek, there's a wolf. Supporting Tim and VA Democrats has NEVER been more urgent:**
* \-- We are nearing the end of the absentee voting period, meaning after that voters HAVE to get to the polls on Election Day.

* \-- Our plan is already set in stone, and changing it this close to Election Day could take away key ads and mobilization plans that are supposed to turn out voters and win us House seats.

So Derek, this isn't just us trying to raise more money for the hell of it -- the truth is, that money is already accounted for and has a destination -- **so when we miss a goal we are actually _running out of money_ to fund our campaign.**

[I'm attaching Tim's note from before below, but I wanted to add a little more of my own context so you see we're not aiming for the moon here -- we're just aiming to make sure we can pay statewide bills. Can you help us get there?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10eb/3e0906/7417784a/3e370a2e/1183830115/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+attaching+Timrsquos+note+from+be&utm_campaign=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND&source=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10eb/3e0906/7417784a/3e370a2d/1183830115/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?refcode=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND&source=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10eb/3e0906/7417784a/3e370a2c/1183830115/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+5&utm_campaign=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND&source=20181028_2_FR_JR_fwd-LDND")

As the top of the ticket, a lot of folks are counting on me, and today I'm counting on you. Can you chip in, Derek? I don 't want to fall short on our month-end fundraising goal: "" "" * | "" "" ""

name: Team Gillum
subject: We're not stopping
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3606/9e00690/572d1f71/2400f36c/2414375675/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")
Friends, we're down to the final days before Election Day -- and unsurprisingly, Ron DeSantis is spending massive amounts of money to viciously attack Mayor Andrew Gillum and our grassroots movement.

But that's not stopping us. Not even close.

Members of Team Gillum will be knocking on doors, making calls, and reminding our neighbors, friends, and family to get out and vote on or before Tuesday, November 6 -- but it's going take a lot of resources.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more to help make it happen before the final reporting deadline for the State of Florida at midnight on Thursday, November 1?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3606/9e00690/572d1f71/2400f364/2414375675/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+chip+in++ask++or+more+to+help+m")**

Mayor Gillum is the leader we need to make affordable healthcare a right for every Floridian, properly fund our schools, and protect our environment.

We have a real chance to take back the Governor's mansion and lead our state forward -- but we need to win on Election Day first. So, let's get to work.

**[Chip in $5 or more to help us raise the resources we need to get out the vote in the final days before our final fundraising deadline.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3606/9e00690/572d1f71/2400f367/2414375675/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+Chip+in++ask++or+more+to+help+us+raise+t")**

Bring it home,

Team Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3606/9e00690/572d1f71/2400f366/2414375675/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-final-fr-deadline?gpsid=13_55_4734&refcode=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3606/9e00690/572d1f71/2400f379/2414375675/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181028_FinFR2_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx"). I really need your help, friends: **With just a few hours before our midnight deadline, this is your last chance to become a member of this campaign - and right now, we're 208 members short of what we need to win this race and turn New Hampshire blue.**
I'm not accepting any money from the corporations that are bankrolling Chris Sununu's campaign, so grassroots donors like you are _critical_ to our campaign.

We need to stop the Trump-Sununu agenda that puts corporate special interests ahead of the people of New Hampshire. **This is your last chance, so I really need you to become an Election Year Member of this campaign before midnight to help me take back the corner office for Democrats this November.**

**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,
We have a very big and exciting Rally for the Midterms on Tuesday, and I want you there.
**Steve Negron** , **Eddie Edwards** , and **Governor Chris Sununu** will be there - joined by former **New Jersey Governor Chris Christie.**
Tickets are $75 and the money raised will ensure we have the resources at NHGOP to secure victory on November 6th.
Get your tickets on our secure site here: [bit.ly/NHRally](bit.ly/NHRally)
It will be a grand party for our Grand Old Party Tuesday night, and I look forward to seeing you there.
Sincerely,
Wayne MacDonald

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER SUNDAY, OCTOBER 28th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, We have a very big and exciting Rally for the Midterms on Tuesday, and I want you there. Steve Negron , Eddie Edwards , and Governor Chris Sununu will be there - joined by former New Jersey Governor Chris Christie. Tickets are $75 and the money raised will ensure we have the resources at NHGOP to secure victory on November 6th. Get your tickets on our secure site here: bit.ly/NHRally It will be a grand party for our Grand Old Party Tuesday night, and I look forward to seeing you there. Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. NH.GOP/LEADRIGHT EVENT SPOTLIGHT NHGOP PRESS THIS WEEK PHOTO OF THE WEEK A great young Republican group, joined by Chairman Wayne MacDonald, hanging out after Jay Lucas' volunteer appreciation event in Manchester Saturday night! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on our St. Paul's School class, who all became Republican Leadership Initiative Fellows this past week! They have been great to have in the office this cycle and they have been learning a lot about voter contact and how the state party operates! body:
Can you donate to send Josh Harder to Congress and flip a critical seat from red to blue? [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, I'll be blunt: **if Democrats can 't win a seat like CA-10 on November 6, our odds of taking the House will be terrible.**

This is a district that went for Barack Obama _and_ Hillary Clinton. But it's occupied by a Republican who votes for the core of his party's anti-healthcare, anti-middle class agenda.

The good news? **The latest poll has Democrat Josh Harder ahead by two points.**

The bad news? **This race is still close, and there 's plenty of time for the dark money groups spending on the Republicans' behalf to swing this the other way.**

[**So I need your help to lock this seat down in the next 9 days. Can you donate to send Josh Harder to Congress and flip a critical seat from red to blue?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Linda

**\---- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ----**
> Peter,
>
> We're so close to taking back the House of Representatives. But, as we learned in 2016, a small polling error can cost us everything.
>
> All across the country, Democratic challengers are competing with incumbent Republicans who have done nothing but rubber-stamp the Trump administration's racist, climate-destroying policies. Including right here in California.
>
> **The latest polling has Democrat Josh Harder narrowly leading a Republican incumbent in a toss-up district.** [****](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [**Chip in $5 or more to help Josh Harder crack 50% >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Josh Harder and Linda S anchez:_ | | ******[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036691/4ac3d62d/6a0e6898/1ce29971/1653687223/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM")******
> ---
> ******[Chip in $25 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036691/4ac3d62d/6a0e6898/1ce29976/1653687223/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036691/4ac3d62d/6a0e6898/1ce29977/1653687223/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036691/4ac3d62d/6a0e6898/1ce29974/1653687223/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036691/4ac3d62d/6a0e6898/1ce29975/1653687223/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM")******
> ******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
> Josh Harder is an incredible candidate -- you have to be to be leading a four-term incumbent. But his victory (or defeat) rests upon a very, very small margin.
>
> Let's make sure that Josh Harder becomes the next Congressman to represent California's 10th District -- to create jobs, to fight for our environment, and to stand up to the President.
>
> [**Please -- help us start the Blue Wave right here in California >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180810_ls_jh?refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
>
> Onward,
>
> Team Sanchez
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181028_Harder_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

[**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036691/4ac3d62d/6a0e6898/1ce29949/1653687223/VEsHAA/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.
